name: Baked Caramel Corn
recipeInstructions:
1. Preparation Time: 1 hour and 30 minutes.
2. Heat oven to 250 degrees Fahrenheit.
3. Put the popped corn into a buttered roasting pan.
4. Melt the butter in a saucepan.
5. Stir in the brown sugar, corn syrup, and salt.
6. Bring to a boil, stirring constantly.
7. Continue boiling for an additional 5 minutes without stirring.
8. Remove from heat and stir in vanilla extract.
9. Add baking soda and stir well.
10. Pour over the popcorn and stir again.
11. Bake for one hour, stirring every 15 minutes.
